query:
INSERT INTO agent_todos (run_id, todo_id, content, priority, status)
                                    VALUES ($1, $2, $3, $4, $5)
                                    ON CONFLICT (run_id, todo_id)
                                    DO UPDATE SET content = EXCLUDED.content,
                                                  priority = EXCLUDED.priority,
                                                  status   = EXCLUDED.status,
                                                  updated_at = now()
